name: Mask Around
short_description: Mask Around is an action-packed, weird and colorful 2D roguelite with tons of hidden secrets. Buy weapons & items, unlock masks with unique powers and combo enemies using melee attacks and shooting power.
detailed_description:
The planets have aligned: you and the mask have found each other.

Mask Around is a 2D shooter platformer roguelite where every drop of juice counts. This prized yellow goo will boost your moveset in... unexpected ways. Fly, jump, and punch with the gigantic hand coming out your backpack, or decide to take some risk and invest your precious juice in items and weapons.

  • Punch, kick and shoot increasingly creepy enemies

  • Trade juice for weapons and other powerful artefacts

  • Stumble upon Astralis classified secrets...

In the disorienting floors of your former employer facility, the Astralis Foundation, you'll stumble upon many useful trinkets...

  • Masks with unique powers, that you keep across runs

  • Items like the Moon Boots that lets you skywalk, or the Magic Trigger that will make corpses explode

  • Weapons, including your classic sniper & shotgun, but also some more exotic picks

  • Fresh drinks that will temporarily boost your stats

  • Backpack skins, for fashion needs


                                                                                                                             See you around!
